MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Derran Cannady (823.4006) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DERRAN CANNADY'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT is granted. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
